title: Red Flower Ceramic Table Lamp
description:
Our artisans in Vietri sul Mare shape this lamp base on the wheel, then paint the entire floral design freehand before firing. The shade is included — we pair each base with a fabric shade that complements the ceramic.

The base has a rounded, almost globe-shaped body in soft white, with a cascade of hand-painted flowers tumbling down from the top. You will see yellow buttercups, small purple blooms, trailing green leaves, and touches of warm rose-pink. The neck of the lamp has sculpted ceramic ribbon-like bows in a dusty rose colour, giving it a textured, three-dimensional feel. The foot and top finial are glazed in the same soft mauve-pink. The fabric shade has a parchment-like texture with a braided trim along the top and bottom edges.

The lamp gives a warm, diffused light — good for a bedside table, a console, or a living room side table. The ceramic body has real weight to it, so it sits solidly wherever you place it.

Each lamp is made individually, so the position and size of the flowers will vary slightly from piece to piece. The shade is hand-sewn by us to match the proportions of the base.
excerpt: A ceramic table lamp with hand-painted flowers in yellow, pink, and purple on white. Made in Vietri sul Mare.
seoTitle: Red Flower Ceramic Table Lamp — Ceramiche Da Mario
